models.application_remarks: Suitable for optical microscopy hydride segmentation after contrast normalization.
models.short_description: Recommended for optical hydride segmentation when a validated checkpoint is available.
models.detailed_description: Learns hydride morphology from labeled masks. Validate on representative samples and use correction workflow for edge cases before production reporting.

models.application_remarks: Fast CPU baseline for hydride-like contrast patterns and quick QA workflows.
models.short_description: No checkpoint required; deterministic and easy to inspect.
models.detailed_description: Uses CLAHE, adaptive thresholding, and morphology. Best for baseline sanity checks and environments without GPU/ML dependencies.

models.application_remarks: Random-weight tiny smoke model for loading/inference/evaluation pipeline debug only.
models.short_description: Use only for CI/local smoke tests; not for scientific segmentation quality.
models.detailed_description: Generated by scripts/generate_smoke_checkpoint.py. Ensures model I/O orchestration works on clean machines without requiring large checkpoints.
